title: magnolia × thomsoniana
intro: Magnolia × thomsoniana, also known as the Yellow Lily Tree or Chinese Magnolia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Magnoliaceae family. Its bark, leaves, and flowers are used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and promoting digestion, due to its bioactive compounds like alkaloids and saponins. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Magnolia × thomsoniana are typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
